strengths: Extensive fullstack experience across TypeScript, React, Node.js, and REST APIs
Proven ability to own and ship complex systems from database to UI across multiple domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and talks
concerns: No explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or relational database work — core required skills are unverified
Primary tech stack leans heavily toward DLang, MongoDB, and non-standard tools, raising doubts about adaptability to required stack
German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic' despite high on-site presence requirement in Berlin
response.justification: Despite broad fullstack experience, the candidate lacks verified proficiency in PostgreSQL and Nest.js — two explicitly required technologies — and has no demonstrable exposure to renewable energy or construction tech domains; his heavy reliance on DLang, MongoDB, and non-standard tooling suggests misalignment with the role’s pragmatic, scalable platform focus, while his basic German proficiency directly contradicts the high on-site presence requirement.
